title: Hello World
milestones: Newest addition to the Linkin Park fanbase
moments: First "word" - "le"
Cries like a myna bird
Keeps her legs folded up like a little frog
Loves being swaddled
Calms down to white noise

title: The Night Shift
personality: Spit-up queen, but still smiling through it all
moments: Sleep regression turned the house upside down
Mom pulling night shifts like a champ
So many spit ups. So, so many.
Obsessed with the Peppa Pig helium balloon
Still fascinated by ceiling fans

title: Finding Her Voice
milestones: Holds head up during tummy time
personality: Chatty in the mornings, loves eye contact
moments: Listens to Guitar and her eyes go wide
Still fascinated by ceiling fans

title: Here We Go Again
moments: Sleep regression round two
Slept 8 hours straight for 2 glorious nights
Discovered the ukulele
loves: Listening to dad play guitar and piano

title: Rolling & Rocking
milestones: Tried solid foods for the first time
personality: Smiling and laughing all day long
moments: Rolling and sitting like a pro
Non-stop smiling and laughing
First taste of solids: apple and banana
Fade to Black is her jam

title: On The Move
personality: Determined, giggly, grabs everything in sight
moments: Sits on her own now
Still moving those legs non-stop
Only falls asleep with skin touching someone (as always)
dislikes: Anyone who dares touch her chest or face (doctors included, no exceptions)
